name: Horseradish Mustard
recipeIngredient: 1/8 cup freshly grated horseradish or prepared horseradish
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the whole grain mustard, Dijon mustard, and horseradish in a bowl.
2. Add salt and freshly ground black pepper to the mixture.
3. Mix well until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
4. Season to taste with additional salt and pepper if desired.
